log.c(3) Library Functions Manual log.c(3)

NAME

log.c - Logging utility stubs for WASM.

SYNOPSIS

Functions


asciichat_error_t log_mmap_init_simple (const char *log_path, size_t max_size)
bool log_mmap_is_active (void)
void log_mmap_write (int level, const char *file, int line, const char *func, const char *fmt,...)
bool log_mmap_get_usage (size_t *used, size_t *capacity)
void log_mmap_rotate (void)
void server_status_log_append (const char *message)
void log_json_write (int fd, int level, uint64_t time_ns, const char *file, int line, const char *func, const char *json_msg)
int terminal_choose_log_fd (log_level_t level)

Detailed Description

Logging utility stubs for WASM.

Definition in file platform/wasm/stubs/log.c.

Function Documentation

void log_json_write (int fd, int level, uint64_t time_ns, const char * file, int line, const char * func, const char * json_msg)

Definition at line 51 of file platform/wasm/stubs/log.c.

52                                           {
53   (void)fd;
54   (void)level;
55   (void)time_ns;
56   (void)file;
57   (void)line;
58   (void)func;
59   (void)json_msg;
60   // No-op - JSON logging in WASM uses console output instead
61 }
